hooks.command: bash -lc 'for root in "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/pipeline/* "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/*/pipeline/* "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; do [ -n "$root" ] || continue; script="$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then exec bash "$script" codex; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/pipeline/* "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/agent-pipeline/*/pipeline/* "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; do [ -n "$root" ] || continue; script="$root/hooks/edit-streak.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then exec bash "$script" codex; fi; done; exit 0'
